calendar.matters:
ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jul-28-2016 Arbitration Award Filed

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Market Dollar To Answer Form Interrogatories Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BIYAL Motion To Compel Defendant Market Dollar To Answer Form Interrogatories Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Defendant Market Dollar shall answer Form Interrogatories 3.1, 3.6, 4.1, 13.1 and 15.1 completely. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deem Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions To Market Dollar Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BIYAL MOTION / Motion To Compel Deem Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions To Market Dollar Admitted And For Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Request for sanctions on all three motions granted. Moving party shall recover from defendant Market Dollar or its attorney sanctions in the amount of $700, payable in 10 days. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Market Dollar To Appear At Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BIYAL Motion To Compel Defendant Market Dollar To Appear At Deposition And For Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Paoli; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Extend Arbitration Jurisdiction Period

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2015 Assigned To Arbitration On Jan-04-16

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TOBACCO FOR LESS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiff alleges sufficient ultimate facts to support the causes of action. Defendant raises factual issues that would best be resolved on summary judgment. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
